subject: An emaciated, decaying zombie figure shambling forward in a moonlit swamp. Its ribs and skull are visible, skin pulled tight over bone, and its arms hang loosely at its sides as it lurches between dead trees.
description: A gaunt zombie stands center-frame in a swampy nocturnal landscape, illuminated by sickly greenish moonlight. The figure is skeletal — ribcage clearly defined, skull-like face hollowed out, mouth slack — with grayish-green decaying flesh stretched over the bones. Its arms hang at its sides, head tilted slightly forward in a mindless shamble. Behind the corpse, gnarled leafless trees reach skyward against a hazy, dark green-black sky. The ground is wet and murky, suggesting bog or graveyard terrain. The lighting is rim/backlit from the moon, casting cold green highlights along the corpse's silhouette while the front of the body falls into shadow.
foreground: Skeletal walking corpse with visible ribs, hollow eyes, slack jaw, decaying gray-green flesh.
background: Dead swamp at night with bare gnarled trees and a hazy luminous sky behind the figure.
emotion: mindless, vacant — a body driven by hunger or compulsion, no human expression remaining
